summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SY Homes Entities module iteration 2 (Alembic migration retrofit + insurance alert threshold sweep). All 53 backend tests passed (31 API tests + 22 insurance alert sweep tests). Frontend CRUD, filtering, search, hierarchy navigation, and insurance badge highlighting all working correctly. Alembic migrations verified.

minor.issue: Seeded data was modified (SY Homes Construction entity_type changed from ConstructionCo to Parent, parent_entity_id set to null). Fixed by restoring correct values.
minor.resolution: Data restored to match seed.py expectations

issues: Console warning: In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option> - minor React hydration warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Alembic migration 0001_initial_entities correctly reproduces schema from Base.metadata.create_all()
alembic current returns '0001_initial_entities (head)' - migration applied correctly
alembic check returns 'No new upgrade operations detected' - no schema drift
Insurance alert sweep correctly fires at exact thresholds (60, 30, 14, 7, 0 days) with new severity labels (60_day, 30_day, 14_day, 7_day, 0_day, expired)
Insurance alert sweep correctly fires daily for expired policies
Insurance alert sweep correctly ignores struck_off entities and null policies
Preview endpoint /api/meta/insurance-alerts still returns UI-bucket severity values (upcoming, warning, critical, expired) - unchanged
All 31 iteration 1 API tests still pass (regression verified)
All 22 new insurance alert threshold sweep tests pass
seed_data_creation: Fixed seeded data: SY Homes (Construction) Ltd restored to entity_type=ConstructionCo with parent_entity_id pointing to SY Homes Ltd
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_entities_api.py (31 tests). Insurance alert sweep tests in /app/backend/tests/test_insurance_alerts.py (22 tests). Run with PYTHONPATH=/app/backend for insurance alert tests. Alembic migrations verified - single revision 0001_initial_entities at head. Insurance alert thresholds: 60, 30, 14, 7, 0 days with severity labels 60_day, 30_day, 14_day, 7_day, 0_day, expired. Preview endpoint uses UI-bucket severities: upcoming, warning, critical, expired.
